news.summary:
# Summary

Gastrobistro Nage in Antwerp is moving away from the traditional tasting menu format that can feel intimidating or restrictive to diners. This change makes the restaurant more accessible and flexible for visitors who want to enjoy fine dining without committing to a lengthy, predetermined menu experience. For anyone visiting Antwerp, this means you can enjoy quality gastronomy at Nage with more freedom in choosing what and how much to eat.

news.title: Newcastle music store JG Windows set to become Giggling Squid restaurant - business-live.co.uk
news.summary:
# Summary

A historic Newcastle music store, JG Windows, is being converted into a Giggling Squid restaurant, a Thai dining establishment. This would be the Thai chain's first location in Newcastle, offering visitors a new upscale dining option in the city center. For food lovers exploring Newcastle, this represents a significant addition to the local restaurant scene with an established restaurant group bringing quality Thai cuisine to the area.

This is relevant for Newcastle visitors because they can now enjoy the market's in-demand food in a different, casual beer garden setting without having to visit the Quayside Market itself.
